meaning: v.漂白,使变白,遮断阳光 发白
examples: For fresh ones, blanch using salted water.
Blanch frozen edamame over boiling water for 1-2 mins.
No doubt the coffee snobs will blanch at the prospect.
Christina Blanch is an instructor and doctoral assistant at Ball State University in Muncie, Ind.
Remi Casty and Damien Blanch got the others in Dragons' best win over Wigan.
